summary: Two pillar headers establish the strategic split at the top, while the lower body carries the detailed proof cards and operating logic beneath each pillar.
composition_pattern: top pillar headers, lower detail field, compact synthesis edge
support_structure: lower detail cards beneath each pillar
optional compact side or bottom synthesis note
when_to_use: The page needs more initiative detail under each pillar
The upper body should stay conceptually clean while detail sits below
avoid_when: The page should resolve with one strong bottom synthesis strip
The detailed proof would overcrowd the lower field
